notes: Convert FAQ to collapsible accordion on Why Choose page

content.value:
Why Choose Newcastle Hub FAQ

Do you provide local support in Newcastle?

Yes. We work with local businesses and can support implementation with practical, local-market context.

Do you only build websites?

No. We help with website, ordering, Google growth, and conversion-focused execution as one system.

How do we start?

Start with a free audit. We identify quick wins and map a staged execution plan.
